text: SSO with Azure AD is mandatory for us. We can't roll out without it.
Please add SCIM provisioning. Managing users manually is painful.
Your Gantt view is great but exporting to PDF breaks the layout.
We need audit logs: who changed what and when, for compliance.
Subtasks should have assignees and due dates. Right now it's too limited.
App is slow when opening a project with 500+ tasks. Takes 10-15 seconds.
Please allow keyboard shortcuts for quick task creation (like 'N' for new task).
Notifications are too noisy. I want granular settings per project.
I can't find archived projects easily. Need a dedicated archive filter.
SSO again: Okta support would be ideal, Azure AD minimum.
Recurring tasks: weekly/monthly schedules are missing.
Time tracking per task would help invoicing our clients.
Data retention policy options required (delete after X months).
Kanban swimlanes per assignee would make our workflow clearer.
Mobile: can't drag tasks in board view. Feels broken.
Would love a public roadmap page so we can see what's coming.
Permissions are confusing. Need role templates and better defaults.
Search doesn't find tasks by tag reliably. Sometimes no results.
Please add bulk edit: change assignee/due date for many tasks at once.
We need integrations: Slack notifications and Jira sync.
We require SAML 2.0 SSO and enforced MFA for all users.
When exporting a project, include custom fields and task comments.
Dashboards: I want a portfolio view across projects with status at a glance.
Pricing feels high for small teams. Any lighter plan or usage-based option?
Need API access to create/update tasks. Webhooks too.
Task dependencies would help planning. Like blockers and predecessors.
Login sometimes loops back to the sign-in screen. Can't reproduce reliably.
We need regional hosting (EU) and DPA docs for procurement.
Please allow client guests with limited permissions (read-only on selected projects).
Calendar view should show milestones and allow dragging dates.
